data_description.dbx_volumes_path: Target path in Databricks Volumes used for parquet staging, e.g. /Volumes/catalog/schema/volume/

abort.already_configured: This Databricks target is already configured.

data.keep_local_file: Keep Local Parquet File After Upload

data_description.entity_like: SQL LIKE pattern to filter entities, e.g. sensor.%
data_description.chunk_size: Number of rows per extraction chunk (1 000 – 500 000)
data_description.local_path: Local directory used for temporary parquet staging
data_description.auto_sync_interval_minutes: How often the integration triggers sync automatically
